title: GenomeLens 多物种局部共线性
description: 多物种局部共线性聚合子模块。它围绕目标基因把多个物种中的对应局部区域汇总到同一张图里，用于比较候选位点在不同基因组中的邻域保守性、片段拆分与跨物种对应模式。
description_en: An aggregate multi-species local synteny submodule. It gathers the corresponding local regions from multiple species around target genes into one figure, enabling comparison of neighborhood conservation, segment splitting, and cross-species correspondence around candidate loci.
context: 多物种候选位点局部保守性总览。
context_en: Overview of local conservation around candidate loci across multiple species.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 多物种局部共线性总图输出目录。这里通常会生成围绕候选位点的跨物种汇总图件。
params.description_en: Output directory for multi-species local synteny results. This usually contains the cross-species summary figure centered on candidate loci.

params.label: Tracks
params.description: 多物种轨道定义列表，用于告诉插件每个物种的显示名称与 BED 来源，从而组织局部共线性图中的多条基因轨道。
params.description_en: List of multi-species track definitions that tells the plugin each display name and BED source, allowing it to organize the multiple gene tracks in the local synteny figure.

params.label: Blocks 文件
params.description: 多物种局部共线性所依赖的共线性区块文件，用于从全局结果中抽取与目标位点相关的连接关系。
params.description_en: Synteny blocks file used by the multi-species local view to extract the links relevant to the target loci from the broader result set.

params.label: 合并 BED 文件
params.description: 合并后的 BED 文件，提供所有参与物种的统一基因顺序与坐标背景，是多物种局部窗口定位的关键输入。
params.description_en: Merged BED file providing unified gene order and coordinate context for all participating species. It is a key input for locating the local windows across species.

params.label: 目标基因 ID
params.description: 需要作为比较中心的目标基因 ID。插件会围绕这些位点收集多物种局部区域并汇总出图；多个基因用逗号分隔。
params.description_en: Target gene IDs to serve as the comparison centers. The plugin gathers the corresponding local regions across species around these loci and summarizes them in the final figure; separate multiple IDs with commas.

params.label: 上游窗口基因数
params.description: 在每个目标基因上游保留多少个基因进入多物种局部汇总图，用于扩展比较窗口。
params.description_en: How many genes upstream of each target gene should be retained in the multi-species local summary figure, extending the comparison window.

params.label: 下游窗口基因数
params.description: 在每个目标基因下游保留多少个基因进入多物种局部汇总图，与上游窗口共同决定观察范围。
params.description_en: How many genes downstream of each target gene should be retained in the multi-species local summary figure. Together with the upstream window, it defines the inspected range.

params.label: 输出格式
params.description: 多物种局部共线性图输出格式。若计划进一步编辑标注与排版，推荐优先使用矢量格式。
params.description_en: Output format for the multi-species local synteny figure. Vector formats are recommended if further annotation and layout editing is planned.
